text: I wake up at 6:30 a.m. every day. First, I stretch and drink a glass of water. Then I have a quick breakfast and take a short walk to start my morning. My work schedule is from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m., but I take a break at noon to eat lunch. After work, I exercise for 30 minutes—sometimes jogging, sometimes yoga. In the evening, I cook dinner, read a book, or call my family. Finally, I go to bed by 10:30 p.m. Following this routine helps me stay healthy and productive. Consistency is key to making it work.
